title: Ikigai: The Japanese secret to a long and happy life
description: Bring meaning and joy to all your days with the internationally bestselling guide to ikigai . According to the Japanese, everyone has an ikigai --a reason for living. And according to the residents of the Japanese island of Okinawa--home to the world’s longest-living people--finding it is the key to a happier and longer life. Inspiring and soothing, this book will bring you closer to these centenarians’ secrets: how they leave urgency behind; keep doing what they love for as long as possible; nurture friendships; live in the moment; participate in their communities; and throw themselves into their passions. And it provides practical tools to help you discover your own personal ikigai . Because who doesn’t want to find the joy in every day?

title: Atomic Habits
description: Atomic Habits offers a practical framework for building good habits and breaking bad ones. James Clear explains how tiny changes in behavior, repeated consistently, can lead to remarkable long-term results in personal growth, productivity, health, and success.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
description: Rich Dad Poor Dad contrasts two different mindsets about money, work, and investing. Through simple stories and lessons, Robert Kiyosaki explains financial literacy, assets vs liabilities, and the importance of making money work for you.

title: Wings of Fire
description: Wings of Fire is the inspiring autobiography of Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam. It traces his journey from a modest childhood to becoming one of India’s most respected scientists and the President of India, highlighting perseverance, learning, and national service.

title: The Silent Patient
description: The Silent Patient is a psychological thriller about Alicia Berenson, a famous painter who shoots her husband and then stops speaking entirely. The story follows a psychotherapist determined to uncover the truth behind her silence.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
description: Introduction to Algorithms is a comprehensive academic text covering algorithm design, analysis, and implementation. It explains fundamental topics such as sorting, searching, dynamic programming, greedy methods, graphs, and advanced algorithmic techniques.

title: Computer Awareness for Competitive Exams
description: This book is designed for candidates preparing for competitive exams and covers computer fundamentals, hardware, software, operating systems, networking, internet concepts, database basics, and commonly asked objective questions for practice.

title: The Alchemist
description: The Alchemist is a philosophical fiction novel that follows Santiago, a young shepherd, on his journey to discover treasure and his personal legend. The book explores dreams, destiny, courage, and the pursuit of one’s purpose.

title: Deep Work
description: Deep Work explores the value of focused, distraction-free effort in a world filled with constant interruptions. Cal Newport explains why deep concentration is a superpower for learning, producing high-value work, and building a meaningful professional life.
